title: astragalus macrocephalus subsp. finitimus
intro: Astragalus macrocephalus subsp. finitimus, also known as the 'Mountain Milk Vetch' or 'Finn's Milk Vetch', is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus macrocephalus subsp. finitimus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. Astragalus macrocephalus subsp. finitimus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
